Localization.Description: Running a process under a database account may indicate an attempt of an attacker who gained the ability to execute queries to the database to escalate privileges

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: Process {object.process.name} is run as user {subject.account.name} (PostgreSQL database user {subject.application.account.name}) with the result written to table {object.name} on host {event_src.host}
An attempt to run a process as user {subject.application.account.name} of the PostgreSQL database on host {event_src.host} with the result written to table {object.name}
